texto: Parent-Teacher ConferenceAt the parent-teacher conference,my father made a scene.He scared my fifth-grade teacher,with his mask from Halloween. She showed him all my science gradesand said she was concerned,but he just stuck his tongue outwhen my teacher’s back was turned. He drew a monster on the boardand claimed it was her twin.He even shook her soda,which expolded on her chin. My angry teacher crossed her armsand said, “This meeting’s done!I now see where he gets it from—you act just like your son!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Darren Sardelli: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Parent-Teacher ConferenceAt the parent-teacher conference,my father made a scene.He scared my fif…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, humour, poetry pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de poetry e school.
